description_long: This is a large, double-headed sledgehammer with a robust, metallic head featuring two rectangular striking faces. The head is reinforced with gold-colored metal bands and prominent rivets, giving it a reinforced, industrial appearance. The central section of the head has a square, blue-accented detail on each side, adding a decorative or possibly functional element. The handle is long, cylindrical, and appears to be made of wood, with metallic rings and a gold accent near the head for added strength and grip. The overall design is heavy-duty, suggesting it is intended for demanding tasks such as demolition or construction. The surface of the metal shows a slightly worn, matte finish, indicating durability and resistance to wear.
description: A heavy, double-headed sledgehammer with a reinforced metallic head, gold bands, and a long wooden handle with metallic accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing both striking faces, gold bands with rivets, and the blue-accented central detail.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rectangular profile of the head and the thickness of the gold bands.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the opposite striking face and central blue detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the rectangular head profile and gold banding.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with cylindrical shape, reinforced by metallic rings and a gold accent near the head; appears smooth with some grip enhancement from the metal bands.
attribute_head_type: Double-headed sledgehammer type with two large rectangular striking faces, reinforced by gold-colored bands and rivets; features a central blue-accented square detail.
